name: Safe transfer cleanup
description: Low-value Pokémon, excluding favorites and common valuables.
notes: Good first-pass cleanup filter before you bulk transfer.

name: Appraisal cleanup
description: Quick pass for lower-appraisal Pokémon before manual review.
notes: Broad filter with no protection rules added.

name: Great League candidates
description: Pull likely lower-CP candidates for manual PvP review.
notes: This is a rough screen, not a ranking tool.

name: Ultra League candidates
description: Review mid-range CP options that may fit Ultra League.
notes: A quick storage scan for likely UL candidates.

name: Distance trade prep
description: Find Pokémon caught far away for trade bonus planning.

name: Recent trade batch
description: Show recent catches that are easy to review for trades.
notes: Good for scanning new catches before transfer.

name: Raid-ready attackers
description: Surface stronger Pokémon for raid team review.

name: New Pokédex evolve check
description: Show Pokémon that can evolve and may add a new Pokédex entry.
notes: Useful when checking for new evolution entries.

name: Shiny review
description: Quick filter for shiny storage review.

name: Exclude tagged keepers
description: Filter out a keeper tag from larger cleanup searches.
notes: Tag exclusion can help protect your custom keeper groups.
